food_name: Box O' Joe (Dunkin' Donuts Hot Americano, 10-Serving Box)

ontology.foodon_gap_note: FoodOn has a general 'coffee beverage' class (FOODON_03301339). No specific code exists for Americano or bulk-box coffee format; closest_parent used.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A00LC covers hot coffee beverages broadly. No Americano-specific or bulk-box code exists; closest_parent used.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: SNOMED CT 34718004 refers to coffee as a substance. No Americano-specific or bulk-serving concept exists; closest_parent used.

serving.description: 1 cup (approximately 240 ml) — one of 10 servings from the box
serving.natural_language_portion: One serving from the Box O' Joe is approximately one 240 ml cup of hot Americano coffee, representing one-tenth of the full 10-serving box.

nutrient_source.title: Coffee, brewed from grounds, prepared with tap water (USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy, FDC ID 171890)
nutrient_source.organization: USDA Agricultural Research Service — FoodData Central
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Dunkin' Donuts Americano is espresso diluted with hot water, nutritionally equivalent to brewed black coffee per 100 ml. USDA SR Legacy entry for brewed black coffee (FDC ID 171890) used as the reference. Values are per 100 g (approximately 100 ml). No milk or sugar is included in the base product. The Box O' Joe format is a 10-serving bulk container; per-100g nutrient profile is identical to a single serving of plain brewed Americano.

gi_source.title: Glycemic index of beverages — black coffee contains no glycemic carbohydrates; GI conventionally assigned as effectively zero
gi_source.source_match_notes: Plain black coffee and Americano contain negligible carbohydrates (0 g per serving) and have no measurable glycemic response. The University of Sydney GI Database does not assign a formal GI to black coffee due to absence of glycemic carbohydrates. Per Veritas convention for zero-carbohydrate beverages, glycemic_index is set to 1 (the lowest valid positive sentinel), gi_category is 'low', and glycemic_load_per_serving is 0.0. This is consistent with peer-reviewed literature confirming no postprandial glucose response from plain black coffee.

hypertension.key_factor: Very low sodium content; caffeine may cause transient blood pressure elevation
hypertension.guidance: Plain black Americano coffee contains approximately 2 mg sodium per 100 ml and poses minimal dietary sodium concern for hypertensive individuals, though caffeine-sensitive patients should moderate intake to avoid transient blood pressure spikes.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: Zero glycemic carbohydrates; no postprandial glucose response when consumed plain
type2_diabetes.guidance: Plain Americano coffee contains no fermentable carbohydrates and does not raise blood glucose, making it suitable for individuals with Type 2 Diabetes when consumed without added sugar or high-fat dairy; epidemiological evidence also associates habitual black coffee consumption with reduced T2D risk.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Negligible saturated fat and cholesterol; antioxidant polyphenols present
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Plain Americano coffee is essentially fat-free and cholesterol-free, and its polyphenol content (chlorogenic acids) is associated with modest cardioprotective effects; moderate consumption of 2–4 cups per day is generally considered safe for most cardiovascular patients.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Box O' Joe is Dunkin' Donuts' branded name for a bulk 10-serving box of hot Americano coffee, sold as a catering or group-serving format. An Americano is prepared by diluting one or more shots of espresso with hot water, producing a beverage similar in strength and appearance to drip-brewed coffee but with a distinct espresso-derived flavour profile — slightly bitter, mildly acidic, with roasted coffee aromatics. Each serving is approximately 240 ml of plain black coffee. The Box O' Joe is popular for office meetings, events, and group gatherings in Singapore and internationally. Nutritionally, plain Americano coffee is essentially a zero-calorie, zero-carbohydrate beverage: per 100 ml it provides approximately 1 kcal, 0.12 g protein, 0.02 g fat, and 0 g carbohydrate, with trace sodium (2 mg) and a modest potassium content (49 mg). It contains no sugar, no dietary fibre, and no significant macronutrients. The beverage is naturally vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free in its plain form. Clinically, plain black Americano coffee does not raise blood glucose and is appropriate for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes when consumed without added sugar or cream. Its negligible sodium and fat content make it suitable for hypertensive and cardiovascular patients in moderate amounts. Caffeine content is approximately 40–60 mg per 100 ml, which may be relevant for caffeine-sensitive individuals. The Box O' Joe format is available at Dunkin' Donuts outlets in Singapore, including the Funan location, and is priced at SGD 30 for the full 10-serving box.
common_user_queries: What is Box O' Joe from Dunkin' Donuts?
How many calories in Dunkin' Donuts Box O' Joe?
Is Box O' Joe suitable for diabetics?
What is the serving size of Box O' Joe?
How much caffeine is in Box O' Joe?
Can I order Box O' Joe for a group?
What is the price of Box O' Joe in Singapore?

confidence_reason: Nutrient values are sourced from USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy for plain brewed black coffee (FDC ID 171890), which is nutritionally equivalent to a plain Americano. No Dunkin'-specific nutritional panel was available from an approved primary source. The Box O' Joe format is a bulk packaging of standard Americano; per-100g values are identical to a single serving. Confidence is medium rather than high because the exact Dunkin' Donuts formulation was not verified against an approved branded database entry.
notes: 1. Per-100g nutrient profile is based on USDA SR Legacy brewed black coffee (FDC ID 171890), adapted for Americano (espresso + hot water), which is nutritionally equivalent. 2. carbohydrate_g is naturally zero as plain brewed coffee contains no glycemic carbohydrates. sugar_g is naturally zero by product formulation (no added sugar in plain Americano). dietary_fibre_g is naturally zero as coffee is a liquid beverage with no fibre. 3. saturated_fat_g is 0.0 — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central for plain brewed coffee. trans_fat_g is 0.0 — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central. cholesterol_mg is 0.0 — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central. vitamin_c_mg is 0.0 — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central. vitamin_a_mcg_rae is 0.0 — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central. vitamin_b6_mg is 0.0 — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central. vitamin_b12_mcg is 0.0 — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central. vitamin_d_mcg is 0.0 — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central. vitamin_e_mg is 0.0 — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central. selenium_mcg is 0.0 — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central. 4. glycemic_index set to 1 (effectively zero) as this beverage contains no glycemic carbohydrates; gi_category low per Veritas convention for zero-carbohydrate beverages. glycemic_load_per_serving is 0.0 as carbohydrate_g per serving is 0. 5. protein_g (0.12 g per 100g) and fat_g (0.02 g per 100g) are trace amounts confirmed by USDA FoodData Central; these are not zero and do not require zero-justification. 6. Multilingual local names are not applicable for this product: Box O' Joe is a US-origin branded commercial coffee product sold in Singapore; it does not have established Chinese, Malay, Tamil, or Hindi names. The cuisine category is 'Coffee' (not 'Singaporean'), so G6 multilingual requirements for Singaporean dishes do not apply. 7. The Box O' Joe is sold at SGD 30 for 10 servings (SGD 3 per cup). 8. Dunkin' Donuts Funan is the sole listed Singapore outlet in the input record.

improvement_actions_taken: Iteration 1: Initial draft built. Identified that carbohydrate_g=0.0 required zero-justification in notes. Added zero-macro justification phrases for carbohydrate_g, sugar_g, dietary_fibre_g, saturated_fat_g, trans_fat_g, cholesterol_mg, and other confirmed-zero micronutrients.

Iteration 2: Verified aliases_by_language consistency — all 10 english aliases confirmed present verbatim in flat aliases list. Verified GI sentinel value=1 and gi_category='low' per Veritas zero-calorie beverage glycemic rule. Verified all ontology match_type values use only allowed strings (exact/closest_parent/none). Verified G6 multilingual compliance: cuisine is 'Coffee' (US-origin branded product), not 'Singaporean', so Chinese/Malay/Tamil/Hindi requirements do not apply.
